title: Contacts Search
description: The Contacts module now includes a search feature that allows Administrators and Managers to search for contacts by name, organization, or status. The search is accessible from the Contacts landing page via a new Search card. Users can enter partial names, select an organization from a dropdown, or filter by contact status (Pending, Approved, Denied, Withdrawn). Results display in a sortable table with columns for Name, Organization, Status, and Date Submitted. Clicking a result opens the contact's profile. The search supports pagination with 25 results per page.

userStories.title: Administrator searches by name
userStories.description: As an Administrator, I want to search for contacts by entering a partial name so that I can quickly find a specific contact without scrolling through the full list.

userStories.title: Manager filters by status
userStories.description: As a Manager, I want to filter contacts by status (Pending, Approved, Denied, Withdrawn) so that I can review all contacts at a specific stage of the process.

userStories.title: Search results pagination
userStories.description: As a user, I want search results to be paginated at 25 per page so that the page loads quickly even with hundreds of contacts.
